name: fish_market
description: Deep Ocean Fish Market PWA — Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CLIENT,SERVER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix client && npm run test --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
